description: [UNVERIFIED — authored from official API docs; test with your API key before signing] Figma REST API via a personal access token — read your profile, files, nodes, comments, projects, and teams. Sent in the 'X-Figma-Token' header.

credentialFields.name: accessToken
credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.description: Create at https://www.figma.com/settings (Account → Personal access tokens). Sent in the 'X-Figma-Token' header.

tools.name: figma_get_me
tools.description: Get the authenticated user (id, handle, email, img_url).

tools.name: figma_get_file
tools.description: Get a file's document tree and metadata by its file key (the key in figma.com/file/<file_key>/...).

params.name: file_key
params.description: File key from the file URL.

params.name: version
params.description: Specific version id to fetch (defaults to current).

params.name: depth
params.description: How many levels of the node tree to return (e.g. 1 for pages only).

params.name: geometry
params.description: Set to 'paths' to include vector geometry.

tools.name: figma_get_file_nodes
tools.description: Get specific nodes from a file by their ids.

params.name: file_key
params.description: File key from the file URL.

params.name: depth
params.description: How many levels below each requested node to return.

tools.name: figma_get_file_comments
tools.description: List the comments on a file.

params.name: file_key
params.description: File key from the file URL.

tools.name: figma_list_project_files
tools.description: List the files in a project.

tools.name: figma_list_team_projects
tools.description: List the projects belonging to a team.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Team id (the number in the figma.com/files/team/<team_id>/... URL).
